g.text: ⚠ rclone backend in use. Kopia upstream marks the rclone backend as 'Not
On Google Drive in particular each `kopia snapshot create` round-trip costs
1-5 minutes. Consider switching to a native Kopia backend (Tailscale/SFTP for
self-hosted, Backblaze B2 for cloud) for an order-of-magnitude speedup.
See docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md → "Backups against rclone+Google Drive feel very
